        "User wants me to run a Jira sync script with specific parameters.",
        "The script will take 5-15 minutes, so I need to monitor it for up to 10 times (30 seconds apart).",

        "After completion or failure, I need to send appropriate notifications.",
        "This is a multi-step task requiring patience and proper error handling."
    ],

        "session": 1,
        "reset": false,
        "code": "python /a0/usr/skills/jira/scripts/jira_reader.py --filter-id 13811 --view-id 10489904"
    }
}
